title: De-couple hardcoded project bindings (REQ-H7)
description: agents/seed-queue-from-openspec.mjs hardcodes LinguaFlow agent names (denholm/richmond/moss) and discards the loadDomains() result — read agent routing from domains.json instead. agents/paperclip-sync.mjs hardcodes stale model IDs — read from config. Spec: REQ-H7.
